game.short_text: A short puzzle game about founding cities
game.title: Founding

details.title: Founding
details.description:
How to play
Use the mouse to drag game pieces. Your goal is to get all pieces onto the board. Each type of piece has restrictions on where it can be placed.
Press the button in the bottom right corner of the game window if you want to make it fullscreen.
This game was made for the 1-bit jam. It only has two colors on screen at all times. The theme for the jam was "You Start With Everything And End With Nothing"
Note for 1-bit jam judging
The game is playable on phones as well as desktop computers, but the port to mobile was made after the jam submission ended. The game is functionally identical whichever way you play it, but for the intents of judging you might want to use a computer.
PUZZLE SOLUTIONS
Puzzle 1
Puzzle 2

Puzzle 4

Puzzle 7HINT:Place the bridge first

game.title: Dungeon Escape
game.short_text: Escape the dungeon with a hole in you'r pocket.

details.title: Dungeon Escape
details.description:
The game is an entry for the "1-BIT JAM #2" with the theme:
"You start with everything and end with nothing"

ABOUT THE GAME:
You'r goal is to escape the dungeon but there's a problem, you kinda of have a hole in you'r pocket... that means each step you take you leave a coin behind you and that's also why you can't move with zero coins. You can of course go back through you'r trail and collect the coins
You start with all you'r coins and by the end you'r left with nothing. In order to leave through the exit you must have only one coin to leave behind you and you must also have all 3 keys!
The game includes 18 levels that get progressively harder. 
In those levels you'll discover a variety of obstacles some times they help and sometimes they don't, These are the obstacles you will find:
Button - press the button(stand on it) to make things apear/disapear/both/nothing.Broken Tiles - once you leave a broken tile a hole will apear going in that hole will restart the level.Tunnel - when entering a tunnel you'll be teleported to a random tunnel exit in the level.Chest - the chest may give you coins or take some.
CONTROLS:
W A S D / Arrows - to move
CREDITS:
Music - (OpenGameArt) https://opengameart.org/
Art & SFX - Mine

game.title: Clamber
game.short_text: A deckbuilder where you pet your dog and climb a mountain

details.title: Clamber
details.description:
Released under the Studio Hemvist label. 

So what is this?

Well it's a deckbuilder. Play cards to climb the mountain, reach checkpoints to get new cards, build a deck that can take you to the top! That said, the mountain is not kind and will require you to sacrifice parts of your deck along the way.
The game is 10-15 minutes and there is an ending, so keep on going even if it feels tough!

Credits!

Developed for 1-bit jam #2 by:
ro (aka @rosdump_ on insta)- arts and game + story design 
newlife+ - music and audio

gustaf (aka gustaf) - playtesting

isabelle fougner axrup (aka wistpotion) - the other stuff
  
Check out the label Studio Hemvist on socials (tiktok really) for high quality shitposting (and when the time feels right, quite decently acceptable games)

game.title: Celestial Soulmates
game.short_text: A romantic platformer about loss

details.title: Celestial Soulmates
details.description:
Help Lucy the devil find a way back to Mike, her angel boyfriend.Your journey will not be easy, as the ground below you withers and rots.Can you really be with him, or are you truly destined to lose everything?
Trade the souls of your celestial enemies to gain powerful artifacts.Chain unlockable abilities to rush past a flurry of foes.Escape in the nick of time from the curse that haunts you.
Controls:WASD or arrow keys to move and jumpLEFT MOUSE BUTTON to aim and shoot while in air.RIGHT MOUSE BUTTON for active ability.
If you get stuck, feel free to activate assist mode in the options. This mode will grant you invincibility and help you get to the end of the story.
 This game was made in a week for the 1-bit jam #2
"You start with everything and end with nothing"

We worked really hard and are extremely proud of the result.  Enjoy!

Programming, development and Sound effects by littlepuly . Art, animation and writing by Hegpie .Music by Kfir Geva - https://linktr.ee/kfirgeva

game.title: Miss Cupcake Sprinkletop
game.short_text: Chuck presents as an overly enthusiastic Christmas elf

details.title: Miss Cupcake Sprinkletop
details.description:
This is a short, chaotic game made in a few days for 1-Bit Jam #2 
in which you play as an elf who doesn't know her own strength.

It's Christmas Eve! That means it's time for Santa's presents to be delivered to all the good little boys and girls... and adults, pets, and everything in between. Santa's generosity extends to all. But he can't do it himself though. He gets help from his little elves who are just as thrilled to deliver presents as he is. Among them, no elf is as excited as Cupcake Sprinkletop! One could say she's a little too excited.

The game:
Your job is to deliver all the presents you're holding. How many you have is shown at the top-left corner of the screen. You can't proceed to the next level until that number is 0. Not just that number but also the little number below it which shows how many are currently out and not delivered to somebody. If you can't do that before the clock runs out you will lose and Cupcake will tear her employee ID.
Look for characters and objects with a thick outline. This means they can receive a present. This includes people, cats, dogs, and doors.
Watch out for hazards. Ghosts will cause you to go down a floor if touched and fire, if touched, will send you to the last elevator you stepped out of.
Controls:
A, D or Arrow Keys to move
W, UP, or Space to jump
Aim and LMB to throw gifts.
Q and S to operate elevators

The Theme:
The theme of this jam was: "You start with everything and end with nothing". After a little thinking, I came up with the idea of gifting. I thought that would fit with the theme perfectly. And it's that time of year again to do exactly that (at the time this is being published). 

Credits:
Music by Juhani Junkala: https://opengameart.org/users/subspaceaudio
Sound Effects from Zapsplat: https://www.zapsplat.com/

game.short_text: An intriguing terminal game, manage a network of airborne couriers to conduct illicit transactions.
game.title: Digital Distrib

details.title: Digital Distrib
details.description:
An intriguing terminal game, manage a network of airborne couriers to conduct illicit transactions.
How to Play:
In this game most of your actions are done through the game terminal by inserting commands.Commands and items are not case-sensitive, so you can enter them with or without capitalization, it wouldn't affect the validity of the input line.
Your goal is to sell air cargo packages that you have in the inventory window each cycle with the planes you have, and once you have collected enough cash, you can end the cycle with <terminate> and purchase upgrades.
These four steps in order will help you determine what to do next:
<ping> an item from inventory, returns interested countries<load> the item into a plane <route> the plane to one of the  interested country <dispatch> plane to make the airdrop and transaction
Please refer back to the command list using the <help> command, as it will show you how each command is written and what they do.
Commands:
<help> returns a list of commands
<ping [Item ID]> 
Signals the item to interested parties
<load [Item ID] [Plane ID]> 
Loads specified item into the specified plane
<unload [Plane ID]> 
Unloads the specified plane from carried items
<route [Plane ID] [Country]> 
Sets the destination of the given plane to the specified country
<dispatch [Plane ID]>
  Specified plane departs to its predetermined destination
<repair [Plane ID]> 
Repairs a specified plane to its best condition      
<initialize> or <init>
  Starts the system
<terminate> or <end> 
Ends the cycle, saves progress
<more> 
Load more commands
<rename [Plane ID] [New ID]> 
Renames specified plane ID to a new one (Requires special ability from shop)
<force [Item ID] [Country]> 
Force sells a product to a country (Requires special ability from shop)
<balance> Returns the total amount of money in the vault
<dialogue> Revisits old conversation logs
<dev> Activates dev mode

game.short_text: A lynchesque roadtrip in the quest for the lost love: a narrative DRIVEn game.

details.title: Pinky's Dream
details.description:
The game is inspired by the song 'Pinky's Dream' by Karen O and David Lynch. Embark on a mystical road trip where you'll encounter various characters each with their own unique stories. Your advice will be crucial to them, and every word you choose could determine their fate... and yours. Discover all the endings and immerse yourself in the eerie world of 'Pinky's Dream.'
We are immensely proud to have released a complete game in such a short time. We plan to continue refining and expanding it. Stay tuned!Development & Design: Eli SmolhaStory: Eli Smolha & RunnwgEditing: BrisingamenMusic: Sasha Starost & Feel GainsbourgArt: Eli's suffering and DALL-E.

game.title: Rustlin' Jimmies
game.short_text: A reverse Snake, bullet hell, roguelike. Jimmies be rustlin'!

details.title: Rustlin' Jimmies
details.description:
Oh boy, Jimmy and his gang of friends, all named Jimmy, are fighting one hell of a battle against some weird-ass army of heckin' drones!? Get strong, be agile, be water, be snake. But most of all, make sure you preserve that energy! You don't want them Jimmies to run out of that juicy juice. Don't let these drones get the best of you, don't let them rustle your Jimmies! Even if you do get rustled, let's give 'em a good fight!
-----------------------------------
CONTROLS
Movement: [WASD] or [Arrow Keys] / [Left Stick] or [D-pad]
Dash (Once upgraded): [Space] or [1] / [South Button]
Burst (Once upgraded): [Z] or [2] / [West Button]
Teleport (Once upgraded): [X] or [3] / [North Button]
Invulnerability (Once upgraded): [C] or [4] / [East Button]
-----------------------------------
WORD FROM THE DEV
This game was made in approximately a week for the 1-bit jam #2. The rule is that it had to be 1bit. The theme was "Start with everything, end with nothing" so we're basically playing reverse snake. The main menu music is an original soundtrack I used in a previous game jam, everything else is brand new, by me (including the gameplay music :)) 
ADDITIONAL CREDITS:
Fonts / Itch Cover + Banner: StoffCreates

(Many different upgrade options, including additional perks to abilities to make them more viable as builds, were left unexplored due to time constraints. Many enemy/attack types and a different game mode too. Potential post-jam though!)

game.title: Diminishing Returns
game.short_text: From VOID, CHAOS. From CHAOS, CHANGE.

details.title: Diminishing Returns
details.description:
Can you lose all the cards in your hands before you lose everything?
The universe is vanishing into the VOID. Win a card game agaisnt Death to stop the process.
You win by losing all of the cards in your hands, and you lose cards by matching them. 
5 rules to match cards.  3 loops to try and stop the VOID. 
Be careful, though - with every failed loop, a part of the universe will dissappear forever -taking part of the game with it.
DIMINISHING RETUNRS is an ever chaning game about a deteriorating universe. About 15-30 minutes of game time.
Please leave a comment for any notes/improvements you think should be implemented in the game! I would love to hear your feedback.
Credits:
Code, Art, and Design - VoidMetallurgy
Music - TurtleBox
SFX - Kenny assets (casino and sci-fi packs)
Font - Alagard by Hewet Tsoi
Palette - NOIRE TRUTH by Cheeseismysoul
Made for the 1-Bit game jam, November 2023UPDATE 1.01 : fixed and smoothed card selection process
UPDATE 1.0: fixed a number of game breaking bugs

game.title: Crypt Fiends
game.short_text: A tower defence where you play every level at once

details.title: Crypt Fiends
details.description:
Awaken, my lord! 
Covetous marauders approach our crypt even as we speak. They seek to pilfer our royal treasury at the lowest level of our structure. We must defend our gold from these so-called "Heroes of the Kingdom" at all cost (a strong economy is the backbone of a successful society after all). We cannot allow them to escape with the gold at the bottom of the crypt, or it may spell the end of our ungodly kingdom, I'm afraid (the treasury has begun to run dry from all of the graveyards we have been building). Luckily, you possess the ability to create deadly towers out of nothing but freshly harvested souls of dead adventurers.
Traverse the depths of the underground structure with W/S or Up/Down and inspect every corner of your dominion with A/D or Left/Right. Conjure up defensive structures with Left Mouse Click onto the grids of every level.
=======================================
"You Start with Everything and End with Nothing"1-Bit Jam #2: https://itch.io/jam/1-bit-jam-n2

game.title: Star Keeper
game.short_text: Fight darkness & restore the light of the stars

details.title: Star Keeper
details.description:
An ancient Darkness has awoken and taken the light of the heavens. Only the light of the Everstar can rekindle flames in the Altar of Stars.
As Star Keeper, it is your duty to restore light and save the world from crumbling. 
THIS IS A DEMO
This Gameboy game is a RPG adventure puzzle platformer where you play the role of the Star Keeper, a guardian responsible for keeping the light of the stars aflame. 
Future updates include: more levels, more puzzles, new enemies, a combat system, a story and more! 

HOW TO PLAY:  
Keyboard & Gameboy controls 
 
Z = A button to JUMP & INTERACT
X = B button
L Shift = Select button
Enter = Start button
W, A, S, D = Arrow buttons to MOVE 

CREDITS: 
 
Game design, art & programming by me 
 
Music by Mr. V & the Mod Archive
 
GBStudio Platformer+ Plugin by Hauntology
This project is made with GBStudio for Pizza Jam with the themes "Space Walker & The Zodiac*

NOTES: **This is a work in progress! Check Dev Logs for progress updates.Some parts of the game are pretty laggy as I'm trying to figure out the coding.  Please  leave comments and feedback if you have any on how to improve. Thank you!

game.short_text: Play some puzzle with procedurally generated shapes. Will you be able to guess the right combinations ?
game.title: Geometrica

details.title: Geometrica
details.description:
Submission for 1-bit jam #2
Theme : You Start With Everything And End With Nothing

Attention! Unidentified object approaching!
Try to guess each shape by interweaving different geometric figures, in order to cancel their imminent impact on the planet. But for this you will have to shake your brain, because it is not enough to reproduce the shape with the same color. You have to use opposite colors!
Click on the different settings.
The first geometric shape generated is in the background. The following ones stick on top.
The scale of the figure refers to its size relative to the parent.
You made a mistake? You can always undo your choices to go back.
When you think that everything is good, you just have to validate, and... hope that the generated form can cancel the other one! And of course, you have to choose every parameters at your disposition.
Extract the .exe and the .pck in the same folder

details.description: You managed to get into the suit before the underwater base completely flooded. Your suit is partially destroyed due to the explosion only giving you moments before you suffocate. Get to the safe areas to recover where you'll also get random tools to help you get to the surface!

game.title: Super Disappearing World
game.short_text: Rescue Doug from the Disappearing World!

details.title: Super Disappearing World
details.description:
ABOUT
Your mate Doug is missing! Doug went adventuring in the Disappearing World and hasn't returned. It's up to you to go find him!
Watch out! Things may seem like they have disappeared down there, but just because you can't see them doesn't mean they aren't there.
Created in 24hrs for the 1-BIT JAM #2. Vote here.



HOW TO PLAY
Use the arrow keys for movement and space to jump.

CREDITS
Music - Andrea Baroni UPDATEv1.1 Hardcore Mode + Music loop bug fix

moreInfo.Author: StevePixelFace
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, 8-Bit, Godot, Pixel Art, Short, Simple

details.title: Up and Away
details.description:
Up and Away
Explore this rapidly flooding world, meet friendly companions, and escape the planet using the town scientist's newest invention. 
Although, with so little time to spare, who can you save?
Controls
A - LeftD - RightSpace - JumpE - Interact

Made in Godot
Also on: https://github.com/Aledax/1BitGameJam

details.title: Pure Spite
details.description:
Created in one week for the second 1Bit Jam using Gamemaker Studio 2
All assets and code were made during the jam except for its sound effects and music.
Sound effect : Kronbitshttps://kronbits.itch.io/retrosfx
Musics : Nebula Audiohttps://nebula-audio.itch.io/space-sci-fi-cinematic-pack-i

Play as one of the last earthling mech pilots. A man with a death wish  on a mad crusade against the Thuxites motivated by absolute spite.
Level every maps with your weapons and gadget but beware : after every mission you will lose one of them.

moreInfo.Author: evigouroux
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Black and White, run-and-gun, Sci-fi, Shoot 'Em Up

game.title: Terminal Tile
game.short_text: Think before moving!

details.title: Terminal Tile
details.description:
Two-Toned Goodness!
This game was made as an entry to 1-Bit Jam #2. Besides the obvious limitation of using only two colors, the theme of this game jam was "You start with everything and end with nothing" - and what more claustrophobic than a shrinking play area?
I tried putting some thought behind this game, and I quickly realized how hard it is to make strategic games.

Instructions
You must move to an adjacent tile.For every move you make an event happens.Sometimes the events cause a tile to dissapear.You might wanna collect the teleporter before it's lost.Try to position yourself on the Terminal Tile.

I can't reach 10 streak myself, lol. Good luck!

moreInfo.Author: SteffenJoergensen
moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, 8-Bit, Godot, Indie, Isometric, Minimalist, Pixel Art, Singleplayer, Tileset

game.title: Decay of Opulence (Game Jam)
game.short_text: Explore the ruins of your town and meet crazy fanatics.

details.title: Decay of Opulence (Game Jam)
details.description:
Updates:
Added downloadable executable for windows.Added collision in the church so you can't walk into the void.Made the nail bat weaker.Removed bug that didn't allow the battle music to play.Fixed some grammar mistakes.WASD keys and Z should work on the battle screen now.
Features:
Two Branching StorylinesTwo Final Boss FightsTwo Story EncountersA Nail Bat!Haunting Pixel Art & AnimationOriginal Adaptive ScoreAn Octopus Ghost?A Raven on a Pumpkin?
Controls:
Movement - WASD / Arrow KeysInteract - Space / Z
The theme was "You Start With Everything And End With Nothing" so I decided to be creative and start in a town that had everything it needed to survive and prosper but now it has gone to ruin. Explore the ruins and you'll meet some people who want you to do a few favors for them.The last few games that I have made have been created relatively quickly so I decided to challenge myself even further for this jam. There were plenty of times when I got stressed out but after cutting many ideas, I completed my game. There are a ton of things I want to add to this game, but I am happy with how it came out for this jam.Code & art - Manic (me)
Enemy Art - Dissolved_Sam
Music & SFX - DignifiedDonut
**Font Credits:** - "DOUBLE HOMICIDE" font by Font End Dev
Made with Godot 4.1 and Aseprite.

moreInfo.Tags: 1-bit, Atmospheric, Black and White, Creepy, Godot, Horror, Pixel Art, Turn-based
